name: Realm
author: Phil Orbanes Sr. with Sid Sackson (Gamut of Games, 1973) / AGP port from the William L. Mikulas ruleset, Abstract Games #9
description: Orbanes' forgotten classic of creation vs destruction on a 12x12 board of 16 Realms. Rook-moving Powers create Bases on vacant Realm centres and spawn pointed Enforcers; Enforcers immobilize each other and capture Bases when your Powers outnumber the enemy's. Each turn is a Dispersal (pieces out of one Realm), a Concentration (pieces into one Realm) or a Rearrangement — sub-move order drives the Special Events. First to create all 12 Bases ends the game; most controlled Realms wins.
